ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the football team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school the team represents */,
  "mascot" TEXT /* Team mascot */,
  "team_color" TEXT /* Primary team color */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "postseason_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the postseason */,
  "postseason_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the postseason */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the champion team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season during which the game was played */,
  "team_id_home" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "team_id_away" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Time the game was played */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the game was played */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id_away FOREIGN KEY ("team_id_away") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id_home FOREIGN KEY ("team_id_home") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stat record */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season of the stats */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "offensive_points" INTEGER /* Total offensive points scored */,
  "defensive_points" INTEGER /* Total defensive points allowed */,
  "point_difference" REAL /* Point difference calculated as offensive points minus defensive points */,
  "total_yards" INTEGER /* Total yards gained by the team */,
  "total_rushing_yards" INTEGER /* Total rushing yards gained by the team */,
  "total_passing_yards" INTEGER /* Total passing yards gained by the team */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Number of turnovers by the team */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Number of penalties committed by the team */,
  "penalty_yards" INTEGER /* Total penalty yards committed by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade level of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach belongs to */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the coach (e.g., Head Coach, Assistant Coach) */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging into the system */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, coach, player) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game attended */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player attending the game */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of attendance (e.g., Present, Absent) */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Time the player arrived at the game */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Time the player departed the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stat record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player in the game */,
  "rushing_yards" INTEGER /* Rushing yards gained by the player in the game */,
  "passing_yards" INTEGER /* Passing yards gained by the player in the game */,
  "receptions" INTEGER /* Receptions made by the player in the game */,
  "tackles" INTEGER /* Tackles made by the player in the game */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Interceptions made by the player in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
